license: PD-1923 (public domain in the United States because it was published before January 1, 1931)
rights_holder: Edward Steichen (1879–1973). Public domain by age (pre-1929 publication).
attribution: Edward Steichen, *The Pond — Moonlight*, 1904 (Mamaroneck, New York). Hand-coloured platinum / gum bichromate print. Public domain.
subject: One of Steichen's most-celebrated early Pictorialist photographs. Three surviving prints are known, held by the Metropolitan Museum of Art and the Museum of Modern Art (NYC) per the Wikipedia source. In February 2006 a print sold at Sotheby's for US$2.9 million per the same source. The image was made in 1904 in Mamaroneck, NY, near the home of art critic Charles Caffin.
